name: Scrambled Eggs with Chorizo Sausage
keywords: eggs main dish meats mexican vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the tomato and set aside.
2. Cook the chorizo sausage in a pan over medium heat until browned, then break it into small pieces.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the pan with the cooked chorizo and tomato.
5. Stir gently to combine and cook for about 2-3 minutes, or until the eggs are set but still slightly runny on top.
6. Serve immediately and enjoy your scrambled eggs with chorizo sausage!
